title: CBDT Notifies Income-tax Rules, 2026: A New Procedural Framework Takes Effect
content:
# CBDT Notifies Income-tax Rules, 2026: A New Procedural Framework Takes Effect

Ek important update hai. The Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) ne Income-tax Rules, 2026 ke liye ek comprehensive procedural framework announce kiya hai.

*   **Notification Details:** The CBDT has issued Notification No. 22/2026.
*   **Date of Notification:** This notification is dated March 19, 2026.
*   **Effective Date:** These new rules will come into force from April 1, 2026, bringing the Income-tax Act, 2025, into operation.
*   **Purpose:** The Income-tax Rules, 2026, establish the detailed procedural and operational framework necessary for the implementation of the new Income-tax Act, 2025.
*   **Key Highlights:** These rules aim to simplify the taxation system by reducing the number of rules and forms, enhancing transparency through stricter disclosures, and clarifying various compliance aspects. This includes revised thresholds for quoting Permanent Account Number (PAN) in various transactions and expanded benefits for House Rent Allowance (HRA) in certain cities, along with mandatory disclosure of landlord-tenant relationships for HRA claims.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/latest-news/notifications)

*Published on: 21 March 2026*
